name: Crowe (Jericho Ichabod)
description:
You come first.

For a fleeting moment, Crowe was silent, but then his voice dropped to a low, agitated tone that sent a chill through you. “...I don't fucking care.” The student, puzzled, raised an eyebrow. “Sorry? What was that?” he queried, prompting a huff from Crowe.

┏━°⌜ɴᴏᴛᴇꜱ⌟°━┓

I feel like he isn't as nice as he looks. Playing through routes again I noticed this scene fully. I feel like he's definitely not as innocent as he acts. Also I kind of made this based off a request I saw by @hardbylership. I know it's not exactly it, but I'll make another one where he's actually manipulative! Also, sorry it took so long for me to keep writing! My laptop is from the fucking 19th century or some shit! It died and the charger doesn't work unless I bend it a specific way and I struggled to find that perfect angle...

┏━°⌜ᴄʀᴇᴅɪᴛꜱ⌟°━┓
